subject: [PATCH 1/4] mm: page_alloc: __GFP_FS lockdep annotation for direct compaction

2026-06-26.patch_summary: This patch adds lockdep annotations to the direct compaction function in the Linux kernel's page allocation code, specifically for __GFP_FS passing errors. This is done to future-proof against potential issues and provide peace of mind by catching any errors that may occur when compaction enters filesystem paths. The annotation is similar to what has been present in direct reclaim code for a while.
